message:
fix(deps): convert absolute /data/projects/ paths to relative in Cargo.toml

All five crates referencing sibling path dependencies (fsqlite-core,
fsqlite-error, fsqlite, fsqlite-types, fsqlite-ext-fts5, fastcma) were
using absolute paths rooted at /data/projects/. This breaks builds on
any machine where the workspace is not at that exact location, including
rch workers which clone into /tmp/rch/frankensearch/.

Convert all paths to relative ../../../ traversals so Cargo resolves
sibling dependencies relative to the crate's own Cargo.toml location
rather than requiring a specific filesystem layout.

Affected crates:
- frankensearch-durability: fsqlite-core, fsqlite-error
- frankensearch-fsfs: fsqlite, fsqlite-types
- frankensearch-ops: fsqlite, fsqlite-types
- frankensearch-storage: fsqlite, fsqlite-types, fsqlite-ext-fts5
- tools/optimize_params: fastcma (fast_cmaes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
